find-community.description: Identify and evaluate communities the founder already belongs to and problems worth serving.

validate.description: Validate a business idea through customer pain, existing workarounds, manual delivery, and willingness to pay.

mvp.description: Define the smallest useful product or service that can be shipped quickly and improved from feedback.

processize.description: Turn an idea into a manual-first service process before writing code or automating.

first-customers.description: Create a one-by-one sales plan for reaching the first 100 customers.

pricing.description: Set initial prices, compare pricing models, and design simple price tests.

marketing.description: Build a content and audience plan after early customer proof.

grow.description: Evaluate spending, hiring, fundraising, runway, and scaling through profitable growth.

values.description: Define company values and operating culture before hiring or scaling the team.

review.description: Review a business decision or strategy through small-bet founder principles.
